Requirement: Restrict access to server room with controlled entry (badge/lock/escort)
Gap Description: No controlled entry system, no escort policy
Remediation Action: Install badge access or mechanical locks; enforce escort policy; maintain visitor log

Requirement: 24x7 CCTV covering entry/exit and server racks
Gap Description: No CCTV cameras or recordings
Remediation Action: Install CCTV cameras with 90-day retention; integrate with evidence index; define access controls

Requirement: Environmental sensors and alarms (temperature/humidity) with alerting
Gap Description: No temperature/humidity sensors or alarms
Remediation Action: Install environmental sensors with alerting to IT Ops; configure thresholds and escalation

Requirement: Lockable
Current State: access-controlled storage for backup media (Server Closet)
Gap Description: Physical site observation
Remediation Action: Backup media stored unsecured in Server Closet
Owner: Provide lockable cabinet or safe with restricted access; log access; encrypt offline backups

Requirement: Formal process for asset checkout/movement with approvals and logs
Gap Description: No movement/checkout records; no chain-of-custody for backups or devices
Remediation Action: Implement asset movement form/process, badges for checkout, and update CMDB on movement; require approvals

Requirement: Enforce role-based access for systems and physical areas
Gap Description: Generic admin accounts; no RBAC for server room or systems
Remediation Action: Define roles and RBAC; map AD groups to least-privilege roles; remove generic accounts

Requirement: Maintain visitor log and require escorts in secure areas
Current State: No visitor log or escort policy
Gap Description: Visitors untracked and sometimes unsupervised
Remediation Action: Implement visitor sign-in, photo ID capture, and mandatory escort policy for server room

Requirement: UPS and generator monitoring with alarms and test records
Gap Description: UPS exists but monitoring/test logs missing
Remediation Action: Implement UPS monitoring, test generator, record maintenance; add alerts to IT Ops

Requirement: Fire detection and suppression (FM200/clean agent) in server area
Gap Description: No clean agent suppression or regular test records
Remediation Action: Install or validate fire suppression system; schedule periodic tests and logs

Requirement: Lockable racks and restricted access to server hardware
Gap Description: Server racks unlocked and accessible
Remediation Action: Install rack locks and maintain access list; use tamper-evident seals

Requirement: Physical separation and labeling of critical cabling routes
Gap Description: Unlabeled patching; potential unauthorized changes
Remediation Action: Label all critical cables, produce cabling diagram, restrict patch panel access

Requirement: Offline backup encryption and separate backup admin credentials
Current State: Backups exist but admin creds not separated
Gap Description: Single creds for backup management; media not encrypted?
Remediation Action: Encrypt offline backups; implement separate backup admin account and MFA; store credentials in vault

Requirement: Implement immutable backup storage or WORM to prevent ransomware tampering
Gap Description: Backups can be modified if credentials compromised
Remediation Action: Deploy immutable storage or cloud WORM; isolate backup network access

Requirement: CMDB populated with OS versions
Evidence Location: AD computer mapping and asset tags
Gap Description: CMDB incomplete
Remediation Action: SIP-AM-004; checklist_gap.csv
Owner: Missing OS/EOL and AD mapping for ~90 endpoints and servers
Priority: Complete CMDB with asset tags and AD computer names; schedule quarterly reconciliation

Requirement: Automated patching and weekly compliance reporting for endpoints and servers
Current State: Patch process exists but coverage unknown
Gap Description: No full coverage report for ~90 endpoints; server patches not fully tracked
Remediation Action: Run asset discovery for patching, produce weekly compliance report, remediate exceptions

Requirement: Privileged account handling
Gap Description: AD admins present; MFA for critical systems referenced but not confirmed
Remediation Action: AD logs; Sophos admin configs
Owner: No documented PAM or vault; potential shared creds
Priority: Implement PAM or use credential vault; enforce MFA for all admin accounts; remove shared creds

Requirement: MFA enabled for all remote/admin access and critical systems (Sophos
Evidence Location: MFA for critical systems referenced; coverage not validated
Gap Description: AD / Sophos configs
Remediation Action: MFA may not be enabled for all admin/service access
Owner: Validate MFA enforcement; roll out MFA for all admins and remote VPN users

Requirement: VLANs separating DMZ (public web)
Gap Description: endpoints; firewall rules reviewed
Remediation Action: VLANs present; DMZ hosts public web server behind Sophos
Priority: Firewall rule review and DMZ hardening not documented
Target Date: Document VLAN map and firewall rule review; perform penetration test on public web server; restrict management access to DMZ

Requirement: Sophos endpoint & firewall full coverage; rulebase export and IDS/IPS tuning documented
Current State: Sophos in use; rulebase export pending
Gap Description: No exported rulebase or IDS tune report available for auditors
Remediation Action: Export rulebase, IDS/IPS settings, update history; document Sophos coverage for ~90 endpoints

Requirement: Central log server retention (90 days+)
Evidence Location: Central logging plan exists but retention not confirmed
Gap Description: Logging server (pending)
Remediation Action: Logs not centralized/retention policy unclear
Owner: Deploy central logging (SIEM or log server), set retention 90 days, configure critical alerts

Requirement: Quarterly restore tests for critical systems with documented MTTR
Gap Description: Restore tests missing for AD, web, file server
Remediation Action: Schedule and execute quarterly restores; document MTTR and issues; attach reports to evidence index

Requirement: Tabletop and live drills semi-annually; document actions and improvements
Gap Description: CSIRT tabletop/exercise not done
Remediation Action: Conduct semi-annual tabletop exercises (AD compromise, web deface, ransomware); record lessons learned

Requirement: Annual review of Sophos and ISP contracts covering incident cooperation and response SLAs
Current State: Vendor contracts exist but annual review not documented
Gap Description: Incident cooperation clauses and contact validation not recent
Remediation Action: Review and update Sophos and ISP contracts for incident response clauses; maintain contact list

Requirement: Automated access logs for server room (badge/CCTV correlation)
Gap Description: No logs to prove who accessed room and when
Remediation Action: Implement badge access and link to CCTV logs; maintain access logs for 1 year

Requirement: Formal change control
Gap Description: Ad-hoc changes observed
Remediation Action: Change records (pending)
Owner: No formal change control or CAB minutes
Priority: Implement change request process and CAB reviews, keep configuration backups

Requirement: Encryption for sensitive data on servers and during transport
Current State: Encryption policy referenced; implementation not fully documented
Gap Description: Unclear which datasets are encrypted at rest; TLS for web pending validation
Remediation Action: Validate and document encryption at rest for sensitive shares and TLS for web; apply where missing

Requirement: Signage indicating restricted area and security rules posted at server room entry
Gap Description: No visual deterrence or legal notice
Remediation Action: Install restricted area signage and visitor rules at entry points

Requirement: Training completion records for annual e-learning and phishing for ~90 endpoints
Current State: Training program defined but not executed
Gap Description: No completion records for staff training
Remediation Action: Deliver initial training and phishing simulation; retain completion certificates in HR/LMS
